history.reasoning: The node exhibits multiple severe anomalies: RSRP at -118 dBm is below the normal threshold (> -110 dBm), indicating weak signal strength; Packet Loss at 12% exceeds the normal < 2% threshold; Throughput is only 18 Mbps, far below the expected ~300 Mbps; and Failed Handovers are 80% (8 out of 10), above the normal < 10% threshold. These issues suggest critical network degradation.
